title: Hexture Backport
description: A resource pack that backports the new 1.20 hex casting textures to 1.19.2
body:
# Hexture Backport

A resource pack backporting 1.20 [Hex Casting](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting) textures to 1.19.2 hex.

All of these wonderful textures were made by [falkory](https://modrinth.com/user/Falkory220) and will be available in the 1.20 release of hexcasting !
